slides.subtitle: And the fashion industry will never be the same

tweets.text:
Amazon. Google. Zara. All launched virtual try-on in the same year.

60% of Gen Z now expects to try before they buy - online.

This isn't a trend anymore. It's the new standard.

3 years ago this was a gimmick. Now it's a dealbreaker.

Brands without virtual try-on are losing customers to brands that have it.

The gap is widening every quarter.

The numbers don't lie.

Virtual try-on cuts returns by up to 64%. Increases purchase confidence by 2.5x. Brands using it see 30% higher conversion.

This is not a feature. It's a revenue shift.

This is exactly what we built Slidez for.

One photo. Real outfits from real brands. Try before you buy - without leaving your phone.

The shift already happened.

The question is whether you're ahead of it or behind it.

Follow @slidez - we track this so you don't have to.
